homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends electronic and techno influences with a prominent flute melody over a driving bassline and pulsating rhythm. The song builds from a slower introduction into an energetic, fast-paced beat that creates a high-stakes atmosphere suitable for dance or gaming soundtracks.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends energetic techno elements with a strong bassline and electronic drums to create an upbeat, danceable rhythm. The repetitive synth lead melody establishes a fast-paced groove that feels perfect for a nightclub or rave setting.

Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece features a beautiful classical piano solo performed at a slow tempo, allowing the intricate melodies and harmonies to take center stage. The music maintains a steady, repetitive rhythm that fosters a calming yet melancholic atmosphere perfect for moments of reflection or dramatic film scores.

questions.description:

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features a steady rhythm of guitar, bass, and drums that blends with serene field recordings of birds chirping and flowing water. The natural soundscape, including wind and rustling leaves, creates a relaxing atmosphere ideal for meditation or as a backdrop for nature documentaries.

questions.caption: This instrumental piece delivers a repetitive and hypnotic beat driven by synthesizers, creating a deep and energetic groove ideal for a nightclub setting. Although the track has an electronic foundation that feels slightly retro, its minimal structure gives it an intense, urgent quality often found in rave scenes.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment serves as a minimalist game soundtrack, driven by a simple yet effective piano melody and a steady rhythm. A haunting violin line overlays the track to create a contemplative mood filled with nostalgia and sadness. The piece maintains a slow pace that enhances its melancholic atmosphere without relying on complex instrumentation.

questions.caption: This instrumental composition blends game soundtrack elements with a fantasy-inspired atmosphere, featuring a steady and repetitive rhythm that maintains an engaging beat. The track harmoniously combines a melodic keyboard foundation with added depth from electric guitars and synthesizers to create a mysterious and adventurous mood. Its simple yet effective musical structure makes it well-suited for scenes involving exploration, discovery, or interactive digital worlds.

The result is a soothing piece that effectively captures the serene feel of a recorded soundscape.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
